question: What two abilities do Solarian 'Sun-Dancers' manifest?

answers.original: Solarian Sun-Dancers manifest Solar-Ribbons and Radiance-Bursts.

ops.description: Riven Prime's music industry deals with the complexity of licensing due to access to past sonic data streams.
Xylotians use Telepathic Resonance Bands for communication.

entities.name: Solarian Sun-Dancers
entities.description: Solarian Sun-Dancers are individuals who create Solar-Ribbons and Radiance-Bursts, performing only during daylight hours.

entities.name: Solarian Culture
entities.description: Solarian Culture worships the power of the sun and includes practices like Sun-Dancer performances and festivals.

entities.name: Radiance-Bursts
entities.description: Radiance-Bursts are explosive releases of concentrated solar energy generated by Solarian Sun-Dancers, capable of melting metal at close range.

relations.description: The Sun-Temple is a significant location for Solarian Sun-Dancers and their culture.
Solarian Sun-Dancers are part of Solarian Culture, which worships the power of the sun.
Solarian Sun-Dancers generate Radiance-Bursts as part of their performances.
Radiance-Bursts are used by Solarian Sun-Dancers as part of their cultural practices and can melt metal at close range.
Solarian Sun-Dancers create Solar-Ribbons as part of their performances.
Solar-Ribbons are used by Solarian Sun-Dancers as part of their cultural practices and can blind enemies or illuminate darkness.
Solarian Sun-Dancers perform during Solarian Festivals, which celebrate the summer solstice.
The Solar-Academy teaches light-based combat, which is relevant to Solarian Sun-Dancers' training.

entities.name: Pyralia
entities.description: Pyralia is the innermost planet in the K'tharr System, characterized by volcanic activity and a close orbit to K'tharr Prime.<SEP>Pyralia is the innermost planet in the K'tharr System, characterized by volcanic activity and a close orbit to K'tharr Prime.

entities.name: Celestia
entities.description: Celestia is a planet known as a leading center for advanced audiovisual entertainment and film production.<SEP>Celestia is a location with a competitive and highly technical film industry.
